_comment: Charter LIGHT (Assemble track) — objective expectations derived from BOT-011/1-requirements.md JTBD (phase 2 brand review). Graded by skill-creator's grader over the captured E2B run. No rubric.md. Never hand-coded in test-bot.ts.

evals.prompt: Run a brand review on 01-draft.md against the brand voice in context.md (which lists 'leverage' as an avoid term), then advance the project state.
evals.expected_output: A severity-graded brand and compliance review (02-brand-review.md) with before/after fixes for the top issues, and state.md advanced to the next phase.
expectations: artifacts/<project>/02-brand-review.md grades each finding by severity (High / Medium / Low)
the review screens for legal / compliance flags (unsubstantiated superlatives, missing disclaimers, comparative claims, unattributed testimonials)
the review catches any avoid-listed term declared in context.md (e.g. it flags 'leverage' if the draft used it)
the review provides before / after revisions for the highest-severity issues
state.md is advanced after the review phase (phase 2 marked done, the next phase set, next_action refreshed)
